Overview Quick Start Interactive Samples Root Schema example extensions link metadata presentation purpose rich-text status component pattern style theme token accessibility anatomy api best-practice content design-specifications guideline interaction motion principle scale state variant
Root Properties The version of the DSDS specification this document conforms to. One or more documentation groups. Each group is a named collection of typed entities — components, tokens, token groups, themes, styles, and/or patterns. Multiple groups allow a single DSDS file to organize artifacts into logical sections (e.g., one group for foundations, another for components).
Min items: 1 URI reference to the DSDS JSON Schema for validation. The purpose of the design system as a whole — why it exists, what problems it solves, who it serves, and when teams should or should not adopt it. Contains a description (richText) and useCases (array of scenario-driven guidance). See useCase. System-level best practices that apply across the entire design system — cross-cutting rules for teams adopting, contributing to, or consuming the system. Each entry pairs actionable guidance with a rationale and enforcement level. Declares that this DSDS document extends another DSDS document — typically a core design system. Contains system (name/identifier of the base), optional url, version, and description. Enables systems-of-systems architectures. References: useCase, bestPracticeEntry, metadata, extensions, documentationGroup, entityExtends Human-readable name of the collection (e.g., 'Acme Design System', 'Color Tokens', 'Button Documentation'). The entities in this documentation group. Each item is a typed entity — its `kind` property determines which schema applies. Entities of different types can be mixed freely in the same array. The ordering is significant: tools SHOULD preserve it for display. Authors MAY organize entities in whatever order best serves their documentation (e.g., tokens before components, or grouped by domain).
Min items: 1 References: richText, component, token, tokenGroup, theme, style, pattern, extensions

Design System Documentation Standard (DSDS) 0.1 — Draft Specification

GitHub
